hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/report.txt || fail 'generated/report.txt should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = 'generated/
*.log' ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/generated/report.txt" ] || fail 'generated/report.txt is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/report.txt")" = '' ] || fail 'generated/report.txt does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/debug.log" ] || fail 'debug.log is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/debug.log")" = '' ] || fail 'debug.log does not contain the required text.'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" '.gitignore
old-notes.txt
roles.txt' | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/report.txt || fail 'generated/report.txt should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = 'generated/
*.log' ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'

set -eu
rm -rf -- volunteer-project
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
git -C volunteer-project init -q -b main
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s '# Volunteer Project

Assignments and meeting times.
' > volunteer-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: unassigned
' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 10:00 AM
' > volunteer-project/meeting-times.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Old volunteer notes

Call list from last season.
' > volunteer-project/old-notes.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Start volunteer project'
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: Riley
' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Update volunteer assignments'
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 9:30 AM
' > volunteer-project/meeting-times.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Update volunteer meeting time'
rm -f -- volunteer-project/assignments.txt
rm -f -- volunteer-project/old-notes.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: Riley
' > volunteer-project/roles.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'generated/
*.log
' > volunteer-project/.gitignore
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project/generated
printf %s '' > volunteer-project/generated/report.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s '' > volunteer-project/debug.log
git -C volunteer-project add -A

generated/
*.log

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 4 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" '.gitignore
README.md
roles.txt
meeting-times.txt' | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/report.txt || fail 'generated/report.txt should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'

starterFiles.content:
generated/
*.log

learningGoals: Audit the repository before structural work begins
Stage a related rename and removal
Create and verify a precise ignore policy
Restore an unrelated accidental edit without disturbing staged cleanup
Commit and verify the final clean release snapshot
